headline: Prediction Market Volume Will Reach $1 Trillion By 2030: Bernstein
summary: Bernstein projects prediction market volumes will hit $240 billion in 2026 and reach $1 trillion by 2030. What it means for HOOD, COIN, DKNG, and FLUT.

headline: NYSE Content Update: OpenLoop Health Debuts At-Home Sleep Apnea Test with 98% Accuracy
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.
